title: SophisticatedFix
description: Fix a major issue with Sophisticated backpack were there is HUNDREDS of variant for essentially the same block in the creative menu
body:
This mod remove the annoying variants from the creative tab (Those dyed and wood variants are also removed in  recipes viewers like EMI, Only tested on EMI currently).

**Currently, it's only doing this, I plan to add more things to the mod later on.**

**Fabric port coming.**
